data.title: Microservices
data.description: Instagram is built on a microservice architecture enabling scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on AWS, utilizes Docker for containerization

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: To manage large volumes of data, Instagram implements database sharding.
data.technical_spec: Uses PostgreSQL with custom sharding logic

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A CDN is used to distribute media content efficiently across the globe.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures even distribution of traffic across servers.
data.technical_spec: Nginx and custom load balancing algorithms

data.title: RESTful API
data.description: Provides data access and interaction through APIs following REST principles.
data.technical_spec: JSON over HTTPS, uses OAuth for authentication
